name: get_hospitals_by_insurance
description: Find hospitals that accept a specific insurance company. Use insurance_name parameter (simpler) instead of insurance_company_id. Supports Star Health, ICICI Lombard, HDFC ERGO, Max Bupa, Care Health, Bajaj Allianz, Religare, Aditya Birla, Niva Bupa, and Manipal Cigna.

insurance_name.description: Name of the insurance company (e.g., 'Star Health', 'ICICI Lombard', 'HDFC ERGO'). The function will automatically look up the ID. This is the PREFERRED parameter.

insurance_company_id.description: Insurance company identifier (legacy parameter). Use insurance_name instead for simpler queries. Valid values: 'insurance_company_star_health', 'insurance_company_icici_lombard', etc.
